title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 522.240 - Execution, form of
text:
522.240.  Execution, form of. — The execution on such judgment shall be in the usual form, reciting the recovery, and directing the sheriff to levy the amount of damages so assessed, which amount shall be stated, with interest thereon from the time of such assessment, and the costs of such suit.
(RSMo 1939 § 3271) 
Prior revisions: 1929 § 2884; 1919 § 1034; 1909 § 1241
